calendar.matters:
(Second) Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order To which no opposition has been received is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Moving Party needs to explain in the moving papers, specifically the memorandum of points and authorities, why it no requires an order substantially identical to the order the court signed and filed on December 5, 2024. The only apparent difference between the December 5, 2024 order and the current proposed order is the shorthand by which the Judgment Debtor refers to the Judgment Creditors, which, of course, is without legal effect. If somehow this difference has legal effect, this must be explained in writing.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
